title: TrenchPro
description: TrenchPro is a high-performance, professional-grade 3x3 mining utility designed for modern Minecraft servers (1.21.1+). Unlike basic hammer plugins, TrenchPro is direction-aware and safety-conscious.
body:
# ⚒️ TrenchPro
**TrenchPro** is a high-performance 3x3 mining utility built for Minecraft 1.21.1+. It provides a smart, directional mining experience that respects player builds and server economies.

### ✨ Key Features
* **📐 Directional Mining:** Detects the block face you strike. Clearing a vertical tunnel or a horizontal pit is seamless and automatic.
* **🛡️ Build Protection:** The plugin identifies player-placed blocks and skips them, ensuring your structures remain intact during mass excavation.
* **💎 Custom Blacklist:** Fully configurable block filtering. By default, it protects all Ores, Spawners, and Containers from being accidentally mined in 3x3 mode.
* **📊 PlaceholderAPI:** Use `%trenchpro_status%` to show players their current mode in Scoreboards, Tab lists, or Chat.
* **🔧 Tool Safety:** Automatically halts mining if your tool hits 1 durability, preventing expensive gear from breaking.

### 📜 Commands & Permissions
| Command | Function | Permission |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `/trench` | Toggle 3x3 mode | `trenchpro.toggle` |
| `/trench reload` | Reload config | `trenchpro.admin` |
| `N/A` | Use 3x3 effect | `trenchpro.use` |

---
